member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2
member.summary: Abstract base class for typed ballistic solutions.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.Time
member.summary: The interception time.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.Position
member.summary: The impact position relative to the projectile origin.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.DistanceToPosition
member.summary: The distance to the impact position derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.DirectionToPosition
member.summary: The direction to the impact position derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.ProjectileVelocity
member.summary: The required firing velocity.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.ProjectileSpeed
member.summary: The projectile speed derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.ProjectileDirection
member.summary: The projectile direction derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.ToTarget
member.summary: The displacement from projectile origin to target at t = 0.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.DistanceToTarget
member.summary: The distance to target at t = 0.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.DirectionToTarget
member.summary: The direction to target at t = 0.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.TargetVelocity
member.summary: The target velocity at t = 0.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.TargetSpeed
member.summary: The target speed derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.TargetDirection
member.summary: The target direction derived from .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.ProjectileAcceleration
member.summary: The acceleration vector of the projectile.

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution`2.TargetAcceleration
member.summary: The acceleration vector of the target.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D`1
member.summary: Represents a ballistic solution.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D
member.summary: Provides factory methods for creating ballistic solutions.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D.Best``1(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Returns the solution for the earliest valid interception using projectile speed.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The earliest valid solution. Returns null if no interception is possible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D.Best``1(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Returns the solution for the earliest valid interception using projectile direction.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The earliest valid solution. Returns null if no interception is possible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D.All``1(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Returns all solutions using projectile speed, sorted by interception time.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: All valid solutions sorted by interception time. Empty array if no interception is possible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolutions.BsSolution4D.All``1(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Returns all solutions using projectile direction, sorted by interception time.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: All valid solutions sorted by interception time. Empty array if no interception is possible.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D
member.summary: Provides ballistic equations.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D.Displacement``1(``0,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes displacement under constant acceleration.
member.param: Elapsed time.
Initial velocity vector.
Constant acceleration vector.
member.returns: The displacement vector after has elapsed.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D.Position``1(Godot.Vector4,``0,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes position after elapsed time under constant acceleration.
member.param: Initial position vector.
Elapsed time.
Initial velocity vector.
Constant acceleration vector.
member.returns: The position vector after has elapsed.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D.Velocity``1(``0,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the firing velocity required to hit the target at a given interception time.
member.param: The time until interception (must be positive).
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The required firing velocity vector. Returns if is zero and is zero. Returns a NaN vector if is negative, or if is zero and is non-zero.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D.Time``1(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes all possible interception times between a projectile and a moving target.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: A sorted array of all valid interception times (t ≥ 0). Empty if interception is impossible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsEquations4D.Time``1(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes all possible interception times between a projectile and a moving target.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: A sorted array of all valid interception times (t ≥ 0). Empty if interception is impossible.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsPosition.BsPosition4D
member.summary: Provides methods for computing projectile positions, impact positions, and displacement calculations.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsPosition.BsPosition4D.Best(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the impact position of the earliest valid interception.
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The impact position vector. Returns `NaN` vector if interception is impossible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsPosition.BsPosition4D.Best(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the impact position of the earliest valid interception.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The impact position vector. Returns `NaN` vector if interception is impossible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsPosition.BsPosition4D.All(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes all possible impact positions corresponding to valid interception times.
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: An array of vectors representing all valid impact positions.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsPosition.BsPosition4D.All(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes all possible impact positions corresponding to valid interception times.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: An array of vectors representing all valid impact positions.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsTime.BsTime4D
member.summary: Provides methods for computing interception times between a projectile and a moving target.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsTime.BsTime4D.Best``1(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the earliest positive interception time between a projectile and a moving target.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The earliest interception time (t ≥ 0). Returns if no interception is possible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsTime.BsTime4D.Best``1(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the earliest positive interception time between a projectile and a moving target.
member.typeparam: A floating-point numeric type (e.g., float, double) implementing .
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The earliest interception time (t ≥ 0). Returns if no interception is possible.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsVelocity.BsVelocity4D
member.summary: Provides methods for computing required firing velocities.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsVelocity.BsVelocity4D.Best(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the firing velocity required for the earliest valid interception.
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The required firing velocity vector. Returns `NaN` vector if interception is impossible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsVelocity.BsVelocity4D.Best(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes the firing velocity required for the earliest valid interception.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: The required firing velocity vector. Returns `NaN` vector if interception is impossible.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsVelocity.BsVelocity4D.All(System.Single,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes firing velocities for all valid interception times.
member.param: The speed of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: An array of firing velocity vectors, one for each valid interception time.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsSolvers.BsVelocity.BsVelocity4D.All(Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4,Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Computes firing velocities for all valid interception times.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The vector from the shooter to the target.
The velocity vector of the target.
The acceleration vector of the projectile.
The acceleration vector of the target.
member.returns: An array of firing velocity vectors, one for each valid interception time.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions.<G>$17F6B351FA10C43FA3AFE540217CFAB6.NaN
member.summary: Gets a vector with NaN (Not a Number) values.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions.<G>$17F6B351FA10C43FA3AFE540217CFAB6.From(Godot.Vector3)
member.summary: Creates a two-dimensional vector from a three-dimensional vector using only X and Y components.
member.param: The source three-dimensional vector.
member.returns: A new two-dimensional vector with X and Y components.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions.<G>$17F6B351FA10C43FA3AFE540217CFAB6.From(Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Creates a two-dimensional vector from a four-dimensional vector using only X and Y components.
member.param: The source four-dimensional vector.
member.returns: A new two-dimensional vector with X and Y components.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions.<G>$17F6B351FA10C43FA3AFE540217CFAB6.ToVector3(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts the two-dimensional vector to a three-dimensional vector with a specified Z component.
member.param: The Z component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new three-dimensional vector.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector2Extensions.<G>$17F6B351FA10C43FA3AFE540217CFAB6.ToVector4(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts the two-dimensional vector to a four-dimensional vector with specified Z and W components.
member.param: The Z component value (default is 0).
The W component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new four-dimensional vector.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions.<G>$CF5DE90AD20A45B17EB862341A25E95A.NaN
member.summary: Gets a vector with NaN (Not a Number) values.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions.<G>$CF5DE90AD20A45B17EB862341A25E95A.From(Godot.Vector2,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a three-dimensional vector from a two-dimensional vector with a specified Z component.
member.param: The source two-dimensional vector.
The Z component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new three-dimensional vector.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions.<G>$CF5DE90AD20A45B17EB862341A25E95A.From(Godot.Vector4)
member.summary: Creates a three-dimensional vector from a four-dimensional vector using only X, Y, and Z components.
member.param: The source four-dimensional vector.
member.returns: A new three-dimensional vector with X, Y, and Z components.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions.<G>$CF5DE90AD20A45B17EB862341A25E95A.ToVector2
member.summary: Converts the three-dimensional vector to a two-dimensional vector using only X and Y components.
member.returns: A new two-dimensional vector with X and Y components.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector3Extensions.<G>$CF5DE90AD20A45B17EB862341A25E95A.ToVector4(System.Single)
member.summary: Converts the three-dimensional vector to a four-dimensional vector with a specified W component.
member.param: The W component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new four-dimensional vector.

member.name: T:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with .

member.name: P:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions.<G>$AE678B8E533BC7CAD05ED1C2F2CE3E18.NaN
member.summary: Gets a vector with NaN (Not a Number) values.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions.<G>$AE678B8E533BC7CAD05ED1C2F2CE3E18.From(Godot.Vector2,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a four-dimensional vector from a two-dimensional vector with specified Z and W components.
member.param: The source two-dimensional vector.
The Z component value (default is 0).
The W component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new four-dimensional vector.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions.<G>$AE678B8E533BC7CAD05ED1C2F2CE3E18.From(Godot.Vector3,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a four-dimensional vector from a three-dimensional vector with a specified W component.
member.param: The source three-dimensional vector.
The W component value (default is 0).
member.returns: A new four-dimensional vector.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions.<G>$AE678B8E533BC7CAD05ED1C2F2CE3E18.ToVector2
member.summary: Converts the four-dimensional vector to a two-dimensional vector using only X and Y components.
member.returns: A new two-dimensional vector with X and Y components.

member.name: M:BallisticSolutions.BsVectorExtensions.BsVector4Extensions.<G>$AE678B8E533BC7CAD05ED1C2F2CE3E18.ToVector3
member.summary: Converts the four-dimensional vector to a three-dimensional vector using only X, Y, and Z components.
member.returns: A new three-dimensional vector with X, Y, and Z components.
